tools.name: nbqa + ruff
tools.notes: Not configured in repo, but can be used for notebook code quality. All notebooks currently pass.

tools.name: python json.tool
tools.notes: Validates notebook JSON structure. All notebooks are valid JSON.

linting.notes: No native linting configuration in repository. This is a test fixture repo, not a development repo. Notebooks can be linted with standard tools like nbqa+ruff, but no configuration exists.

testing.notes: This repository contains Jupyter notebooks that are used as TEST FIXTURES by external tests in https://github.com/opendatahub-io/odh-manifests/tree/master/tests. The notebooks themselves are not tests - they are consumed by JupyterHub integration tests in OpenShift CI. There is no test infrastructure in this repository.

ci.notes: No CI/CD configuration exists in this repository. Testing of these notebooks happens externally in the odh-manifests repository's OpenShift CI pipelines.

build.notes: No build system. This is a simple collection of Jupyter notebooks with no package structure or dependencies file.

conventions.test_naming: Notebooks end with a cell printing 'End Of Notebook' as a completion marker
conventions.notes: All notebooks include 'End Of Notebook' print statement in the final cell, likely used by external tests to verify complete execution.

test_commands.notes: Execution: SUCCESS - basic notebook runs without errors
Execution: FAILED - requires SPARK_CLUSTER environment variable pointing to external Spark cluster (KeyError: 'SPARK_CLUSTER')
Execution: FAILED - uses TensorFlow 1.x API (tf.Session) incompatible with TensorFlow 2.x (AttributeError: module 'tensorflow' has no attribute 'Session')

container_recipe.notes: Only basic.ipynb can be executed standalone. spark.ipynb requires a live Spark cluster. tensorflow.ipynb requires TensorFlow 1.x (deprecated). These notebooks are designed to be executed in JupyterHub environments with appropriate infrastructure, not in isolation.

results.notes: No linting violations found in any notebook

results.output_snippet:
[NbConvertApp] Converting notebook basic.ipynb to notebook
[NbConvertApp] Writing 1972 bytes to /tmp/basic_executed.ipynb

results.notes: Requires external Spark cluster infrastructure - cannot validate in isolation
Uses deprecated TensorFlow 1.x API - incompatible with modern TensorFlow

validation.summary: JSON validation: 3/3 pass, Linting: pass, Execution: 1/3 pass (basic.ipynb works, spark requires cluster, tensorflow requires TF 1.x)

gaps: No test infrastructure - notebooks are test fixtures, not tests themselves
No CI/CD pipelines in this repository
No documentation on how to execute or validate notebooks
spark.ipynb requires external Spark cluster infrastructure
tensorflow.ipynb uses deprecated TensorFlow 1.x API incompatible with TensorFlow 2.x
No way to validate patches against actual test suite (tests exist in external repo)
Only basic.ipynb can be executed in a standard Python environment
